metadata.description: Unified security marketplace combining six upstream security projects into one Claude Code plugin: offensive skills + subagents, OWASP defensive review, MEDUSA SAST, ReconForge recon, Dependabot supply-chain security, SecLists wordlists, and ponytail code-review.

plugins.name: security-suite
plugins.description: All-in-one security toolkit: 25 skills, 6 specialist subagents, and code-review commands spanning offensive, defensive, recon, and supply-chain security.
